title: queltia assoana
intro: Queltia assoana is a flowering plant species, native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antidiabetic and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Queltia assoana include potential management of diabetes and reduction of oxidative stress, making it a promising natural remedy for metabolic disorders. Herbal preparations of Queltia assoana are typically used in the form of extracts or infusions, often in traditional medicine practices in Madagascar.
